reviews.comment:
Si vas a comer ..mejor nop aparte de caro loq ay es viejo ..ni empedo milanesa

(Translated by Google)
If you're going to eat there... better not. Besides being expensive, what they have is old... not even drunk would I get a milanesa.

reviews.comment:
Excelente todo. La calidez en la atención y lo profesional de su personal. Sumado a la trayectoria del ACA. Y los recuerdos que me trae....

(Translated by Google)
Everything was excellent. The warmth of the service and the professionalism of the staff. Added to that was the ACA's long-standing reputation. And the memories it brings back...
